subject: [PATCH] nfsd: add missing function name to kerneldoc comment for nfsd_nl_parse_one_export

reviews.author: Chuck Lever
reviews.summary: Confirmed the fix and applied it to nfsd-testing, thanks to Jeff for submitting the patch.
reviews.raw_body:
From: Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>

On Thu, 16 Apr 2026 09:10:00 -0700, Jeff Layton wrote:
> Anna was seeing these warnings with a clang W=1 build:
> 
> Warning: fs/nfsd/export.c:845 Cannot find identifier on line:
> 
> @cd: cache_detail for the svc_export cache,
> Warning: fs/nfsd/export.c:846 Cannot find identifier on line:
> 
> [...]

Applied to nfsd-testing, thanks!

[1/1] nfsd: add missing function name to kerneldoc comment for nfsd_nl_parse_one_export
      (no commit info)

--
Chuck Lever <chuck.lever@oracle.com>

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a missing function name to the kerneldoc comment for nfsd_nl_parse_one_export, fixing warnings generated by clang W=1 builds.
